violations_detail.description: Password input missing explicit <label> association; relies only on placeholder text
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — added htmlFor/id linkage between <label> and <input> (DEF-010 related fix)

violations_detail.description: Login card content not wrapped in a <main> landmark
violations_detail.resolution: Deferred — below AA threshold, logged for WCAG 2.2 roadmap

violations_detail.description: Helper text 'Forgot password?' link ratio 4.3:1 (target 4.5:1 for normal text)
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — colour adjusted to #1a56db on white; ratio now 5.1:1

violations_detail.description: Chart SVG elements contain non-standard aria attributes from charting library
violations_detail.resolution: Deferred — library upstream fix tracked; no functional impact

violations_detail.description: Two tooltip elements share the same aria-describedby target id during rapid renders
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — tooltip ids now include a unique uuid suffix per render

violations_detail.description: Breadcrumb 'Home' link uses only an icon with no accessible name
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — added aria-label='Home' to breadcrumb anchor

violations_detail.description: Table missing <th> column scope on mobile viewport breakpoint (DEF-012)
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — responsive table refactored with data-label attributes and proper scope

violations_detail.description: Log stream scrollable div not focusable via keyboard; keyboard users cannot scroll log output
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — added tabindex=0 and role=log to the scrollable container

violations_detail.description: New log lines appended to DOM without aria-live region announcement
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — wrapped log output in aria-live=polite region with aria-atomic=false

violations_detail.description: Registry filter dropdown missing accessible name
CVE severity badge 'LOW' text contrast 4.2:1 on yellow background
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — badge background darkened; ratio now 4.6:1

violations_detail.description: Node health indicator tooltips dismiss on pointer leave but not on Escape key
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — onKeyDown Escape handler added to tooltip trigger element

violations_detail.description: Role badge <select> in edit dialog loses focus ring in Safari/WebKit
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — explicit :focus-visible outline added via Tailwind ring utility

violations_detail.description: Invite User dialog missing aria-labelledby pointing to dialog title heading
Registry URL input missing autocomplete attribute
violations_detail.resolution: Resolved — autocomplete='url' added to registry URL field

violations_fixed: Missing aria-label on namespace selector dropdown — fixed (DEF-010)
Color contrast ratio 3.8:1 on disabled button text — fixed to 4.8:1 (DEF-011)
Table missing column headers on mobile breakpoint — fixed (DEF-012)
Log stream scrollable region not keyboard-focusable — fixed
Log lines not announced via aria-live region — fixed
Tooltip dismiss not handling Escape key — fixed
Focus ring lost on role badge select in WebKit — fixed
Breadcrumb Home icon link missing accessible name — fixed
Helper text contrast ratio below AA threshold — fixed
keyboard_navigation: all interactive elements reachable via Tab/Enter/Escape; modal focus trap verified on all dialogs; Escape closes all modals and tooltips
screen_reader_tested: NVDA 2024.1 + Chrome 124 — all 8 pages pass; dynamic content updates announced correctly via aria-live regions
additional_assistive_tech_notes: VoiceOver on macOS Sonoma spot-checked on Login, Dashboard, and Container List — no critical issues found
